intent.userRequest: Build a forward-looking blast-radius planning aid for BCOS framework development, with retrospective audit as a secondary mode.
intent.objective: Codify the institutional knowledge of 'what surfaces does this kind of change touch' into a queryable, living skill so framework changes don't silently rot dependent components.

boundariesToDocument: vs ecosystem-manager: complementary roles. ecosystem-manager = creator/advisor for new skills/agents (overlap detection, lessons capture). framework-quality = planner/auditor for ANY framework change (blast-radius, drift detection).
vs clear-planner: inner-outer composition. clear-planner orchestrates the plan; framework-quality plugs in at Step 4 (Gather Context) to emit the blast-radius checklist for AGENTING work.
vs schedule-dispatcher architecture-review: different cadences. architecture-review runs monthly as periodic baseline; framework-quality audit runs on-demand at end of work (or via FIXED END).
relevantLessons: L-INIT-20260404-009: Discovery scripts are source of truth. State files record what discovery found.
L-ECOSYSTEM-20260501-013: State files mirroring disk should be regenerated, not authored.
L-INIT-20260404-005: Infrastructure must be wired into workflow steps to be useful — a checklist nobody follows is worse than no checklist.

steps.name: Understand Intent
steps.result: Two modes (plan primary, audit secondary). Maintainer-facing.

steps.name: Run Discovery
steps.result: 13 existing skills, no overlap. Boundaries documented vs ecosystem-manager / clear-planner / architecture-review.

steps.name: Detect Scenario
steps.result: AGENTING — new skill + new scripts + modifies clear-planner SKILL.md + modifies scenario-phases.md

steps.name: Gather Context
steps.result: Context provided in prompt. Today's ecosystem-state-drift-fix session is the canonical case-study test.

steps.name: Load Scenario Template
steps.result: AGENTING template: Design / Implement / Wire / Document / FIXED END
